name: The Castle Jewelry and Pawn of Florence
description_short: Family-owned jewelry retailer and pawn shop with 11 locations across Kentucky and Ohio, specializing in pre-owned fine jewelry, luxury watches, diamonds, and gold at discounted prices.
description_long:
The Castle Jewelry has operated as a family-owned business since 1988, establishing itself as one of the largest discount jewelry retailers in Kentucky and Ohio. Originally rooted in pawn shop operations, the company has evolved into a multi-location fine jewelry retailer while maintaining its core pawn and collateral lending services across 11 storefronts. The company positions itself as a significant player in the pre-owned luxury goods market, particularly for engagement rings, designer jewelry, and certified timepieces.

The Castle Jewelry's primary offerings include pre-owned and reconditioned fine jewelry, luxury watches (particularly Rolex), diamond engagement rings, wedding bands, gold bullion coins, gemstone jewelry, and designer pieces from brands like Van Cleef & Arpels and Le Vian. They advertise custom ring design services and maintain an active e-commerce platform with daily deals, layaway financing options, and free shipping on orders over $100. Their inventory spans from affordable fashion rings priced under $300 to high-end pieces exceeding $25,000.

The Castle Jewelry distinguishes itself through its A+ Better Business Bureau rating, membership in the Jewelers Board of Trade, 4.7-star Google review rating, 35+ years of operating history, and a network of physical retail locations enabling hands-on inspection before purchase. They emphasize competitive pricing, claiming to offer "best prices guaranteed" on pre-owned items and advertising savings of 19-50% off retail values. The company offers flexible layaway plans and maintains an active social media and email marketing presence.

While the website clearly demonstrates a successful retail jewelry operation with strong customer ratings and longevity, the pawn shop aspect of the business model is not explicitly detailed on the website. Consumers should note that this is fundamentally a pre-owned goods retailer rather than a primary financing or lending institution, though pawn operations may exist at their physical locations. The business model relies on purchasing used inventory at wholesale, making product availability variable and subject to market conditions.
pros: A+ BBB rating and Jewelers Board of Trade accreditation provide third-party credibility verification
4.7-star Google review rating based on 600+ customer reviews demonstrates consistent customer satisfaction
11 physical retail locations across Kentucky and Ohio allow in-person inspection of jewelry before purchase
Advertised savings of 19-50% off retail prices for pre-owned items provide significant cost reduction versus new jewelry
35+ years of continuous operation since 1988 indicates stable, established business with long customer history
Free shipping on orders over $100 and 14-day returns policy reduce purchase risk for online buyers
Layaway financing options available without requiring external credit approval
Specialization in luxury watches and designer jewelry with authentication (Rolex, Van Cleef & Arpels brands)
cons: Pre-owned inventory model means specific items may not be available; selection varies by location and time
Website does not clearly explain pawn shop lending services, collateral-based loans, or how to obtain cash advances against jewelry
Limited transparency on pricing methodology—'retail value' comparisons on website are not independently verified and may be inflated to exaggerate savings percentages
No information provided about loan terms, interest rates, repayment periods, or borrowing limits if using pawn services
Customer review excerpt on homepage is truncated mid-sentence, suggesting incomplete quality control of web content
best_for: Consumers seeking to purchase pre-owned engagement rings and wedding jewelry at 30-50% discounts compared to retail
Buyers interested in luxury watches and certified timepieces with authentication and seller credibility
Individuals needing flexible financing through layaway plans without credit checks
Jewelry sellers and collectors wanting to liquidate pre-owned items through an established, credible buyer
diagnosis: The Castle Jewelry is best for budget-conscious consumers seeking legitimate pre-owned fine jewelry, engagement rings, and luxury watches with strong buyer protections (returns, BBB accreditation, physical store locations). The main caveat is that while this company operates as a legitimate retail jewelry business with verifiable credibility, the website does not explain pawn lending services or cash-advance-against-collateral products that may be available at physical locations, making it unclear whether this is suitable for consumers seeking short-term collateral-based borrowing.
services: Pre-owned fine jewelry sales (diamonds, gemstones, gold)
Luxury watch sales (Rolex, certified pre-owned timepieces)
Engagement rings and bridal jewelry (ready-made and custom design)
Gold and precious metal bullion coins
Designer jewelry (Van Cleef & Arpels, Le Vian, vintage pieces)
Free insured shipping on orders over $100
In-store shopping at 11 Kentucky and Ohio locations
Daily flash sales and promotional discounts
